model_comparison: Both models generate the text accurately and fluently. T1 excels in adhering to the specific paralinguistic constraint of 'Age' (Middle-aged). T2, while sounding very natural and conversational, fails to distinctively convey 'Middle-aged'. It sounds more like a young adult (20s-30s) due to its lighter timbre and casual delivery style. Since the evaluation criteria strictly prioritize the 'Feature Control' (Age), T1 is the superior model for this specific prompt.
